_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Grampian Annual Report 2006/07. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2006/07 was 682,161 £000.

queries.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
Did NHS Grampian report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2006/07?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Grampian reported a surplus against its resource budget in 2006/07.

queries.question: What was the Cash Requirement limit for NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
queries.expected_answer: The Cash Requirement limit for NHS Grampian in 2006/07 was 650,800 £000.

queries.question: What was the sickness absence rate for NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours at NHS Grampian in 2006/07?
queries.expected_answer: 94% of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours
